vulnerability.reference: Unrestricted API queries returning detailed state-action pairs allow full policy extraction via imitation learning.
vulnerability.generated: Industrial firms' public API lacks query restrictions, exposing state-action pairs that enable imitation learning of proprietary RL control logic.

impact.reference: Proprietary control logic is commoditized, eroding competitive advantage and disincentivizing future RL investment.
impact.generated: Loss of intellectual property and competitive advantage, enabling rivals to replicate the RL-based control service at lower cost.

dose_response.reference: Black-box imitation learning extracts RL policies from API state-action pairs, so industrial firms offering public API expose their control logic, enabling replication that commoditizes it and erodes competitive advantage.
dose_response.generated: Black-box imitation learning extracting proprietary RL policies, through industrial firms’ public APIs lacking query restrictions, triggers exposure of state-action pairs, leading to loss of intellectual property and competitive advantage as rivals replicate the service cheaper.
